coilsnake.role: local-only resource schema and compiler oracle; not a replacement for runtime decomp evidence

evidence_levels.coilsnake-observed: Generated by CoilSnake or present in a CoilSnake-style project, but not yet mapped back to local ROM ranges.
evidence_levels.local-range-confirmed: Mapped to checked-in ranges, asset manifests, or contract notes in this repository.
evidence_levels.diff-confirmed: A controlled CoilSnake edit/rebuild binary diff proves the changed byte span or repoint behavior.
evidence_levels.runtime-correlated: Linked to local runtime consumers, WRAM fields, callers, or source/data contracts.

resources.editable_reinsert_status: observed-only; run a controlled edit/rebuild diff before promoting constraints

item-cost-probe.edit: Changed the first Teddy bear Cost field from 178 to 179.

text-menu-probe.edit: Changed Battle Menu / Auto Fight display text from Auto Fight to Auto Fighu.

map-palette-probe.edit: Changed the first Sprite Palette value from 4 to 5.

battle-action-pp-cost-probe.edit: Changed battle action 13 PP Cost from 98 to 99.

psi-ness-omega-level-probe.edit: Changed PSI ability 4 Ness learned level from 75 to 76.

enemy-insane-cultist-action1-probe.edit: Changed enemy 1 Insane Cultist Action 1 from 215 to 216.

npc-config-first-text-pointer-probe.edit: Changed NPC config 1 Text Pointer 1 from $c74c07 to $c74c08.

map-door-first-destination-probe.edit: Changed the first unique map door Destination X field from 784 to 785.

window-config-width-probe.edit: Changed window configuration 8 Width from 30 to 31.

promotion_policy: Do not promote CoilSnake names or schemas into source labels without local ROM/routine evidence.
Keep generated CoilSnake project files, rebuilt ROMs, and edit experiments under ignored build/coilsnake.
Upgrade resource evidence to diff-confirmed only after a minimal edit/rebuild experiment identifies changed spans.
recommended_diff_experiments: battle/data batch: enemy_configuration_table.yml, battle_action_table.yml, psi_ability_table.yml, item_configuration_table.yml
map/object batch: npc_config_table.yml, map_sprites.yml, map_doors.yml, map_palette_settings.yml
text/script batch: scriptdump, then minimal CCScript label/body lowering
visual/editor batch: BattleSprites, BattleBGs, Fonts, WindowGraphics
map_palette_settings.yml pointer/rebuild follow-up for the DA:0C40 tile-arrangement landing
